mapper.sql: t.id, t.amount_id, t.order_id, t.guide_price, t.vehicle_price, t.option_price, t.color_markup, t.service_fee, t.plate_service_fee, t.insurance_fee, t.discount_total, t.subsidy_total, t.finance_discount_total, t.deal_price_total, t.deposit_amount, t.down_payment_amount, t.tail_payment_amount, t.paid_total, t.refund_total, t.receivable_total, t.net_receivable_total, t.unpaid_total, t.invoice_amount, t.calculation_version, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_amount t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order_amount t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_amount t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_amount ( amount_id, order_id, guide_price, vehicle_price, option_price, color_markup, service_fee, plate_service_fee, insurance_fee, discount_total, subsidy_total, finance_discount_total, deal_price_total, deposit_amount, down_payment_amount, tail_payment_amount, paid_total, refund_total, receivable_total, net_receivable_total, unpaid_total, invoice_amount, calculation_version, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{amountId}, #{orderId}, #{guidePrice}, #{vehiclePrice}, #{optionPrice}, #{colorMarkup}, #{serviceFee}, #{plateServiceFee}, #{insuranceFee}, #{discountTotal}, #{subsidyTotal}, #{financeDiscountTotal}, #{dealPriceTotal}, #{depositAmount}, #{downPaymentAmount}, #{tailPaymentAmount}, #{paidTotal}, #{refundTotal}, #{receivableTotal}, #{netReceivableTotal}, #{unpaidTotal}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{calculationVersion}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_amount ( amount_id, order_id, guide_price, vehicle_price, option_price, color_markup, service_fee, plate_service_fee, insurance_fee, discount_total, subsidy_total, finance_discount_total, deal_price_total, deposit_amount, down_payment_amount, tail_payment_amount, paid_total, refund_total, receivable_total, net_receivable_total, unpaid_total, invoice_amount, calculation_version, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.amountId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.guidePrice}, #{item.vehiclePrice}, #{item.optionPrice}, #{item.colorMarkup}, #{item.serviceFee}, #{item.plateServiceFee}, #{item.insuranceFee}, #{item.discountTotal}, #{item.subsidyTotal}, #{item.financeDiscountTotal}, #{item.dealPriceTotal}, #{item.depositAmount}, #{item.downPaymentAmount}, #{item.tailPaymentAmount}, #{item.paidTotal}, #{item.refundTotal}, #{item.receivableTotal}, #{item.netReceivableTotal}, #{item.unpaidTotal}, #{item.invoiceAmount}, #{item.calculationVersion}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_amount t SET
t.guide_price = #{guidePrice},
t.vehicle_price = #{vehiclePrice},
t.paid_total = #{paidTotal},
t.refund_total = #{refundTotal},
t.receivable_total = #{receivableTotal},
t.unpaid_total = #{unpaidTotal},
t.calculation_version = #{calculationVersion},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_amount t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
